ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ngrams" (
  "ngram" TEXT /* The n-gram extracted from the text data */,
  "freq" INTEGER /* Frequency of the n-gram in the dataset */,
  "Agreement" REAL /* Level of agreement associated with the n-gram */,
  "Argument" REAL /* Argument score for the n-gram */,
  "Emotion" REAL /* Emotional tone represented by the n-gram */,
  "Intention" REAL /* Intention inferred from the n-gram */,
  "Judgment" REAL /* Judgment score related to the n-gram */,
  "Others" REAL /* Other relevant metrics or comments */,
  "Speculation" REAL /* Speculation score ascribed to the n-gram */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the metric represented */,
  "max_prop" REAL /* Maximum proportion of the metric in relation to total */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source from which the n-gram was extracted */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The time when the n-gram was extracted */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the text from which the n-gram was extracted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* A composite sentiment score that combines the various metrics */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* A categorization of the overall sentiment */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* The ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "ml_model" TEXT /* The name or version of the machine learning model used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ngram")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* The name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the source was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
